retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operation is only a small part of a larger state machine; failure of the work check causes early return without any refcount action.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to move a block_group to a specific discard list with associated state updates. The refcount increment (btrfs_get_block_group) is a minor conditional side-effect, not the core logic. Unrelated work check, list manipulation, and timestamp assignment dominate.
